notes: Grindare Studio intro replaces the Godot boot logo (geometric neon, 'WHERE GRIND NEVER ENDS' tagline, click-to-skip). Profile sidebar avatar now uses the same chevron ship as the skill tree + in-match player so all three match. Launcher 0.1.8 shows LAUNCHING / GAME STARTING status before quitting so first-press doesn't look like a freeze.
launcher_notes: Shows LAUNCHING / GAME STARTING status before quitting so first-press doesn't look like a 1-3s freeze on Windows cold-start.
